stemHtml: Which one of the statements below regarding DME is correct?

options.a: Two lines of position obtained from two different DMEs give an unambiguous fix.
options.b: The DME operating frequencies are in the UHF band.
options.c: The DME ground station is always co-located with a VOR station.
options.d: The indicated distance is the ground distance measured from the aircraft’s projected position on the ground to the DME ground installation.
